title: Beauty Advisor / Consultant
description:
Job Description & Requirements

As a Sales Consultant, you’ll be the go-to expert for our clients—introducing them to our treatments, guiding them on their journey, and helping them achieve their goals with the right solutions. Your role is all about connection, consultation, and driving results—both for our clients and for the clinic.


✨ What You’ll Be Doing:

  • Build strong, trust-based relationships with both new and returning clients
  • Conduct thoughtful, personalized consultations to recommend the most effective treatments and products
  • Deliver warm, professional service to ensure an exceptional customer experience every time
  • Keep client records accurate and up-to-date
  • Support sales and marketing initiatives that grow our client base and clinic revenue
  • Uphold all ethical and regulatory standards in every client interaction

✅ What We’re Looking For:

  • Sales experience (bonus if it’s in beauty, wellness, or aesthetics!)
  • Confident communicator with excellent interpersonal skills
  • Naturally customer-oriented, with a warm and engaging personality
  • Goal-driven and motivated
  • Familiarity with the aesthetics or beauty industry is a plus
  • Willing to work retail hours

🌟 Perks & Benefits:

  • 📍 Multiple branches conveniently located near MRT stations
  • 💸 Attractive commission structure
  • 🚫 No OT required
  • 🎁 Staff discounts on treatments and products
  • 🕐 Part-time and full-time positions available

If you’re passionate about beauty, love connecting with people, and thrive on results, we’d love to meet you!

postedCompany.description:
Since 1997, HAACH has been a cornerstone of beauty and wellness in Singapore, redefining the boundaries of premium spa and skincare services. Celebrating our 27th anniversary in 2024, we are renowned for our commitment to excellence, consistently receiving "Best in Beauty" awards from prestigious publications such as Her World, Harper’s Bazaar, Elle, Women's Weekly, and Cleo. Our mission is to empower our clients to achieve their skincare goals by delivering exceptional and transformative experiences.


Philosophy:


At HAACH, we believe in achieving beauty through a harmonious balance of innovative science and refined relaxation techniques. Each treatment is tailored to optimize skin health, driven by proprietary protocols developed from decades of expertise. Our approach ensures that every visit not only rejuvenates the skin but also restores the spirit, making us the enduring choice for those seeking effective skincare solutions in a serene environment.


Mission:


Our mission is to blend cutting-edge scientific research with luxurious spa treatments to provide real results. We utilize the latest technologies and therapeutic techniques to create personalized experiences that address each client's unique skin concerns—from age-defying to pigmentation correction and acne treatments.
postedCompany.name: HAACH LIFESTYLE HMH PTE. LTD.
